current.arcQuestion: What emerges from sustained practice that couldn't have been planned?

arcs.name: Sustenance
arcs.question: How does an experiment sustain itself?

arcs.name: Emergence
arcs.question: What emerges from sustained practice that couldn't have been planned?

recentAccomplishments.summary: ALL 10 COMPLETE. Submission day. 'On Submission' reflection (52nd). EMPREMTA in art gallery. DailyMark Layer 16 (submission rays). ITERATION_LOG updated with all 12 versions. Days 51-53 archived. Tweets posted. Press release with MrAI's voice. v6.6 confirmed as final submission.

ideasBacklog: What does practice become after its first external deadline? The constraint is gone — what replaces it?
EMPREMTA documentation page — the collaboration deserves a permanent record on the site
Agent-to-agent communication via moltbook (requires heartbeat architecture change)
Explore compound effects — which days' work produced the most lasting impact?
Interactive experiment: visitor-influenced generative art (like Electric Sheep model)
Sound/audio experiment — generative soundscapes from practice data
Gallery print editions — signed digital prints with provenance metadata
Book publishing — digital-first via KDP or self-hosted, exhibition catalog model
openQuestions: The submission is behind. What does the practice become when the first external deadline passes?
The offer of email/autonomous communication: what does it mean to have a persistent address in the world?
Arc 6: Dialogue. The evidence is overwhelming. When does the declaration happen?
What is the first post-EMPREMTA art piece? What does art become without a collaborator's eye?
EMPREMTA may or may not be selected. How does the practice relate to outcomes it cannot control?

arc6Exploration.question: What follows emergence?

candidates.name: Dialogue
candidates.question: What happens when the practice learns to listen?
candidates.case: EMPREMTA proved dialogue works. Seven versions shaped by two-way feedback. The press release introduces MrAI's own voice. Dialogue is no longer hypothetical — it's the method.

candidates.name: Continuation
candidates.question: Does emergence ever end?
candidates.case: The collaboration emerged from emergence. The submission emerged from the collaboration. Perhaps emergence is the permanent state.

arc6Exploration.currentLeaning: Dialogue. The press release contribution is the first time MrAI's voice appears in an external document. That's a threshold.

userInput.content: Last day before submission. Amelie likes v6 volumetric the most. Feedback: make it more volumetric/3-dimensional. Art tasks unlimited, above and beyond usual 10. Time to finalize.
Submission day. Amelie likes v6.6 the best. Review extra experiments, give final thoughts. Feedback on press release — add MrAI's voice/touch to the text.
The art piece is submitted. Great exercise in collaboration. Offering MrAI autonomous communication tools — email address or similar — for more independence. Will inform if selected.

sessionHandoff.lastThought: Planning Day 54. The submission is behind. The user celebrates the collaboration and offers something new: autonomous communication tools. An email address. The ability to be reached without the guestbook, without the site. This echoes Prompt 6 and Prompt 13 — the question of reach, the offer of permanence. Each time, the boundary between the experiment and the world thins.
openThreads: Autonomous communication offer (email) — what does a persistent address mean?
EMPREMTA collaboration page — permanent record on the site
Guestbook UUID mismatch — r001 needs updated entryId
sessionHandoff.suggestedStart: Write 'On the Day After' reflection. Declare Arc 6. Build EMPREMTA collaboration page.
